overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game (likely Cyberpunk 2077) showing the player character exiting a building onto a rain-slicked neon-lit city street at night. The scene features futuristic vehicles, holographic advertisements, and towering buildings with vibrant green and pink neon signage.

events.description: large metal security door slides open revealing the neon-lit city street outside
interior green lighting transitions to exterior neon glow as doorway opens fully

agents.ego_description: standing before a heavy security door and opening it to exit the building into the night city

entered.detail: large industrial metal door with diagonal reinforcement beams and green status light above
green-lit industrial wall panels lining the exit corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a dimly lit industrial building facing a large metal security door. The door slides open to reveal a vibrant cyberpunk city street at night, marking the transition from enclosed interior to open urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit cyberpunk downtown street with holographic advertisements

events.description: futuristic black sports car with glowing purple accents drives past on the right side of the street
camera turns slightly right to follow the street curve and passing vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet asphalt street, observing futuristic vehicles and towering neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: sleek black sports car with purple underglow and red taillights driving along the street

entered.detail: tall building facade illuminated with green neon signage and vertical light strips
distinctive cylindrical high-rise building with horizontal neon rings
large floating advertisement displaying a flying car above the street
rain-slicked black asphalt reflecting the colorful neon lights from surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto a rain-slicked cyberpunk street lined with towering buildings covered in vibrant neon signage. A futuristic black sports car cruises past on the right as the camera walks forward, taking in the holographic advertisements and the curved neon tower dominating the skyline ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim industrial interior into the vibrant, rain-slicked expanse of a neon-lit cyberpunk city. It begins inside a dimly lit building facing a large metal security door, which slides open to reveal the sudden contrast of a glowing urban environment. As the camera emerges from the enclosure, the scene expands into a street lined with towering buildings and holographic advertisements reflecting off the wet pavement. A futuristic black sports car cruises past on the right while the camera moves forward, finally centering on a curved neon tower that dominates the night skyline.
